gate_conditions.name: Real POD frontend upload + review workflow proven
gate_conditions.note: FRONTEND NOW BUILT + BACKEND MATRIX PROVEN. Built: Pocket app POD panel (file/camera picker, type+size validation, preview, remove/replace, upload state, success, network-failure retry, existing-version + review-status + rejection-reason + resubmit); Carrier Portal POD panel (desktop drag-and-drop + same validation/states); Command Center 'POD Review Queue' (carrier/route/delivery context, signed private preview, approve, reject-with-required-reason). Backend hardened + proven on staging: cc_pocket_upload_pod re-validates carrier org, trip ownership, trip state, MIME, size and the {uid}/pod/{trip}/{file} object path server-side; cc_pod_review_queue / cc_pod_signed_ref / cc_review_pod are reviewer-gated; approval emits invoice.prep_requested exactly once. tests/security/pod_backend_matrix.sql = 21/21 PASS. STILL OPEN (required, not polish): the real browser upload+review captured against a deployed site with a logged-in carrier/driver/staff session (screenshots + Playwright result under evidence/gate/pod/). The assistant cannot type passwords or reach the site via headless egress; owner runs tests/security/pod_workflow.spec.js per the runbook. Owner-executed proof required.

gate_conditions.name: Settlement / payout-hold + maker-checker proven
gate_conditions.note: 11/11 staging matrix PASS: self-approve DENIED, carrier/dispatcher DENIED, different checker approves, duplicate idempotent, stale-version DENIED, amount-change invalidates approval, payout HELD, one event, no money moved. (Carrier-portal settlement view is a minor UI follow-up.)

gate_conditions.name: Authenticated portal mobile / persona browser tests executed
gate_conditions.note: TEST SYSTEM NOW BUILT + STRENGTHENED. persona_matrix.spec.js was upgraded from nav-visibility-only to real SERVER-SIDE enforcement: for each of 11 personas x 4 viewports (44 combos) it opens the correct portal, checks role-aware nav, runs a permitted RPC (success), and calls a FORBIDDEN RPC DIRECTLY against PostgREST with the persona's own token and asserts the backend denies it, plus mobile-menu / no-overflow / clean-console / no env-leak / screenshot. Added: tests/security/{personas.js, auth-setup.spec.js, pod_workflow.spec.js, .env.example, PERSONA-TEST-RUNBOOK.md}, playwright.config.js, .auth/.gitkeep + gitignores. Suite SKIPS cleanly without PERSONAS_READY + storage states (so local gates show expected skips). RBAC SEPARATION already PROVEN via SQL/JWT-simulation (11 personas). STILL OPEN (required, not polish): the owner-run authenticated matrix with ZERO skips (44 combos), JSON+HTML report + traces. Requires owner-generated per-persona storage-states (login) + egress. Owner-executed proof required.

gate_conditions.name: FMCSA verification succeeds with official data
gate_conditions.note: Owner set a valid FMCSA QCMobile WebKey. Live test fmcsa-verify(dot=130113) -> HTTP 200 with real official FMCSA data (GUFFEY-SCHLENSKER DRILLING CORP, authority active, safety fields parsed). Was 403; now live end-to-end with government data. No fabricated data.
